value: ast-grep-rules-2026-03-15: Created 9 ast-grep rules in rules/ast-grep/rules/. AstGrepTool extended with rule-file mode (sg scan --rule). Tool description enumerates all rules for agent auto-discovery. sg installed on ai-proxy (/usr/local/bin/sg v0.41.1). vasp-03 needs RUSTUP_HOME=/root/.rustup when building from source (HOME=/tmp breaks rustup). Workers run on ai-proxy so vasp-03 install is nice-to-have, not blocking.

BeadHub deployed on ai-proxy (CT 800) at port 8080. Docker stack: PostgreSQL 16 + Redis 7 + FastAPI API. Port 8000 blocked by SurrealDB (pid=229). Two workspaces registered: brian-mac (local macOS, lead) and swarm-lead (ai-proxy, lead). bdh v0.10.4 installed on both. SWARM_BEADS_BIN defaults to bdh in run-swarm.sh. BeadHub URL: http://localhost:8080 from ai-proxy, http://100.105.113.58:8080 from external. Start: cd /home/brian/code/beadhub && POSTGRES_PASSWORD=beadhub-local-dev BEADHUB_PORT=8080 docker compose up -d. Issue beefcake-z03n tracks wiring bdh :init into worktree creation.

CRITICAL DOGFOOD FAILURE 2026-03-14: Swarm ran 6+ hours across 3 issues, 0 resolved. Root causes: (1) .beads/ directory corrupted in worktrees — agent deleted it, causing test failures. Fix: add .beads to worktree .gitignore or exclude from agent tool sandbox. (2) Agent never wrote feature code — all 'writes' were cargo fmt reformatting. The auto-fix pipeline ran cargo fmt, agent saw the diff and thought it was its work. (3) No baseline verification — agent started modifying code without confirming tests pass first. (4) No checkpoint revert — agent kept patching broken code forward for 3 iterations instead of reverting. These are the exact problems the Autonomous Research Loop epic (beefcake-1axl) addresses.

dolt-beads-systemd-service-2026-03-15: Dolt remotesapi PERMANENTLY fixed. Root cause: config had remotesapi commented out + listener on 127.0.0.1 + no systemd service. Fix: (1) config.yaml rewritten with remotesapi.port=8001, listener on 0.0.0.0:3307, (2) systemd service dolt-beads.service created and enabled on ai-proxy. Service auto-restarts on crash/reboot. Manage: systemctl {start|stop|restart|status} dolt-beads. Logs: /var/log/dolt-beads.log. Config: /home/brian/code/beefcake-swarm/.beads/dolt/config.yaml.

Dolt server on ai-proxy: config at ~/.beads/dolt/config.yaml, port 3307 (was 14256, fixed 2026-03-15). Start: cd ~/code/beefcake-swarm/.beads/dolt && nohup dolt sql-server --config config.yaml > /tmp/dolt-server.log 2>&1 &. remotesapi not available on Dolt 1.83.1 (no standalone command, config field causes parse errors). Sync via JSONL backups instead of Dolt push. dogfood-loop.sh has JSONL fallback for issue descriptions when bd/bdh fails.

Embedding server deployed: nomic-embed-text-v1.5 GGUF on vasp-02:8082 (CPU-only, 16 threads, 8 parallel slots). Codebase index at /tmp/codebase-embeddings.json (419 files, 6.8MB). Query via POST /v1/embeddings with prefix 'search_query:' for queries and 'search_document:' for indexing. 768 dimensions, cosine similarity. Latency: <100ms per query batch.

file-targeting-fix: find_target_files_by_grep now extracts snake_case identifiers (e.g., edit_file) in addition to CamelCase. Also added path-based scoring boosts: tools/ +2, patches/ -2, tests/ -1. dogfood-loop.sh now passes title+description (first 300 chars) as the objective. Commits 729e36c and 76c69b0.

gemini-tool-calling-research-2026-03-16: Three rounds of Gemini deep research on Qwen3.5+llama.cpp tool calling. Key findings: (1) strict:true silently dropped by llama-server — only additionalProperties:false + required array enforces schema. (2) ToolChoice::Required disables lazy grammar (grammar_lazy=false), forcing GBNF from Token 0. Already set in our coder.rs. (3) Differential Autoparser maps Qwen XML to PEG/GBNF with logit masking. (4) CRITICAL: torn UTF-8 in model output causes nlohmann::json::dump(error_handler_t::strict) to throw unhandled C++ exception, silently dropping fields/tool calls. This may be the root cause of old_content dropping. Fix: patch .dump() to use error_handler_t::replace. Filed as P0 bug. (5) Temperature 0.05 already set correctly. (6) Verify grammar activity with --verbose flag (look for 'Using differential autoparser' and 'Converted grammar:' in llama-server logs).

manager-must-delegate: The cloud manager must NEVER do coding work itself. It must ALWAYS delegate to local workers (proxy_rust_coder, proxy_general_coder, proxy_reasoning_worker). Search tools (search_code, colgrep, ast_grep) were removed from the manager's kernel_strategy_tools() bundle in commit 62c5882. The manager only gets 3 strategy tools: verifier, get_diff, list_changed_files. If search tools or other tactical tools ever get added back to the manager bundle, this violates a hard rule. The test test_manager_no_search_tools enforces this.

notebooklm-hooks-2026-03-15: NotebookLM auto-update hooks configured in ~/.claude/settings.json. Script: ~/.claude/hooks/notebook-update.sh. Fires on PostToolUse (after Bash) and PreCompact. Uses nlm CLI to add notes to project_brain notebook (9ecc5027). State file: ~/.claude/hooks/.notebook-last-commit (tracks last processed HEAD). Uses lockfile /tmp/notebook-update.lock. Exits fast if not in beefcake-swarm or no new commits.

Parallel dispatch + round-robin routing shipped in PR #45 (feat/parallel-dispatch-round-robin). Key: process_issue is !Send (dyn tracing::Value: !Sync), so parallel dispatch uses std::thread::spawn + Handle::block_on, NOT JoinSet. Cooperative cancellation via Arc<AtomicBool> cancel param on process_issue.

process_issue is now Send-safe (Slate Phase 0b, commit 4395de5). Uses tracing::Instrument instead of Span::enter(). Can be dispatched via tokio::spawn / JoinSet. dispatch_parallel_issues in main.rs still uses OS threads but migration to JoinSet is planned for Slate Phase 2.

subtask-worker-budget-2026-03-15: Workers need dynamic turn budgets based on task complexity. Fixed turn limits (8, then 12) caused false-positive budget exhaustion on complex multi-file tasks. Dynamic formula: turns = (n_existing * 15 + n_new * 25).clamp(30,150). Write deadline = 75% of budget. max_tool_calls = 3x turns. Wall-clock deadline (45 min) is the hard outer bound. Also: rig's default_max_turns() is NOT enforced on the outer .prompt() call (line 1224 of orchestrator/mod.rs), only on sub-agents.
